Wired Setting 'Net policy

Bill Dedman The Associated Press September 1996
Journalism & Newsroom

After collecting samples of newsroom policies on Internet use, The Associated Press devised the following policy to guide staff use of electronic resources.

After collecting samples of newsroom policies on Internet use, The Associated Press devised the following policy to guide staff use of electronic resources. Some of the material is unique to AP, but may be useful to other news organizations interested in creating similar guidelines. AP Guidelines for Responsible Use of Electronic Services... Do not forward or post anyone's material without permission.

Do not post or send to individuals any proprietary AP material, including news stories, photos, graphics, audio, video, data, or any internal communication.
